page_content:
Prerequisite: DATA110 or DATA120; and MATH141.

DATA320 Introduction to Data Science (3 Credits)

An introduction to data science i.e., the end-to-end process of going from unstructured, messy data to knowledge and actionable insights. Provides a broad overview of several topics including statistical data analysis, basic data mining and machine learning algorithms, large-scale data management, cloud computing, and information visualization. Prerequisite: DATA110 or DATA120; and DATA200 and DATA250; or by permission of the DATA Program Director.

Jointly offered with: CMSC320.

Restriction: Must not be a Computer Science major.

Credit Only Granted for. CMSC320 or DATA320.
